hypothesis: Fine-tuning a pre-trained universal ML interatomic potential with a targeted MOF-specific DFT dataset of ≤1000 diverse out-of-equilibrium snapshots that sample underrepresented metal–linker coordination chemistries will reduce the fraction of non-converged structural optimizations and unstable NpT molecular dynamics simulations on a held-out diverse MOF test set by at least 50% compared to the same uMLIP without this fine-tuning.
